questions.question: According to the forest department and WWF-India, which tiger reserve recorded a rise in the population of greater one-horned rhinos, with the number climbing from 46 in 2023 to 51 in 2025?

India Infoline Finance Limited (IIFL Finance), India’s leading non-banking financial companies (NBFCs), has rebranded how many of its existing branches as all-women staffed ‘Shakti’ branches to mark Women’s Day (8 March 2025)?
Which of the following countries assumed the Chairmanship of the Bay of Bengal Inter-Governmental Organisation (BOBP-IGO) in 2025?
Who took part in the 69ᵗʰ Session of the United Nations Commission on the Status of Women (UNCSW), held at the UN Headquarters in New York?
In April 2025, India and China initiated discussions to resume direct passenger flights that had been suspended since which year?
In March 2025, which wildlife sanctuary in Punjab was proposed to be developed into a leopard safari to boost eco-tourism?​
What type of assistance is being provided by India to Myanmar under Operation Brahma 2025?
questions.option_1: Disaster relief material, humanitarian assistance, search & rescue teams

questions.question: The 2025 World Economic Forum introduced which initiative focusing on India's role in global geopolitics and innovation?

Which of the following statements about Exercise CYCLONE, conducted in February 2025 is/are correct? 1. It was held at Mahajan Field Firing Ranges in Rajasthan. 2. The participating countries were India and Egypt. 3. The exercise focussed on artillery training of joint forces.
In December 2024, PM Modi made a historic visit to which Gulf country, marking the first such visit by an Indian Prime Minister in 43 years?
What was the theme of Expo 2025 in Osaka, Japan?
questions.option_2: Designing Future Society for Our Lives
questions.option_3: Feeding the Planet, Energy for Life

questions.question: Which of the following statements accurately reflect the outcomes of the 2024 Jammu and Kashmir Assembly elections? 1. The Congress-JKNC alliance secured a majority with 48 seats. 2. The BJP emerged as the single largest party with 29 seats. 3. Voter turnout was recorded at 63.88%, showing a significant rise compared to the recently concluded Lok Sabha election. 4. The newly elected assembly holds full legislative powers equivalent to other Indian states.
Which organisation does the Ministry of Rural Development cooperate with for rural development in Asia and the Pacific?
questions.option_1: Centre on Integrated Rural Development for Asia and Pacific (CIRDAP)

questions.question: The 2025 SEA Games were scheduled to be held in which country?
Which country hosted the 58ᵗʰ Annual Meeting of the Asian Development Bank (ADB) in 2025, where India discussed the Strategic Action Plan 2025-2029?
In March 2025, which national day or week emphasised industrial workplace safety?

Which of the following statements about the Exercise KHANJAR-XII, conducted in March 2025 is/are correct? 1. The exercise was held in the Ladakh region. 2. The exercise was focused on Counter Terrorism and Special Forces operations. 3. The exercise involved troops from The Parachute Regiment (Special Forces) of India and Kyrgyz Scorpion Brigade.
Which country held a presidential runoff election on 13 April 2025, resulting in the re-election of President Daniel Noboa?
In May 2025, Jenu Kuruba families reoccupied their ancestral land in which of the following tiger reserves of India?
Which navigation satellite did India launch in January 2025 to enhance its NavIC system?
Who among the following is appointed as the President of the upcoming COP30 Summit?
What was the theme of the 2024 International Conference of NGOs organised by UNESCO?
Which country took over the presidency of the G7 in January 2025?
Samudrayaan, scheduled for 2026, involves which of the following?
In March 2025, Indian PM Narendra Modi attended the National Day celebrations of which country as the Chief Guest?
